title: Add team members and mentors hyperlinks in About Us section

requirements.text: In the About Us section, add a hyperlink labeled 'Our Team Members' that displays the names: Pramit, Aaryaman, Vansh, Khushi, Radhika, and Kashish

quotes: our team members = Pramit , Aaryaman, Vansh , Khushi , Radhika  and Kashish

acceptanceCriteria: A hyperlink appears in the About section with visible text containing all six team member names
The names are formatted as: Pramit, Aaryaman, Vansh, Khushi, Radhika, and Kashish
The hyperlink has appropriate styling consistent with the dental theme

requirements.text: In the About Us section, add a hyperlink labeled 'Our Mentors' that displays the names: Debadip sir, Omkar sir, and Hari sir

quotes: about our mentors = " Debadip sir , Omkar sir , Hari sir"

acceptanceCriteria: A hyperlink appears in the About section with visible text containing all three mentor names
The names are formatted as: Debadip sir, Omkar sir, and Hari sir
The hyperlink has appropriate styling consistent with the dental theme

constraints: Modify only the About.tsx component in the frontend
Maintain the existing About section structure and styling theme
nonGoals: Adding actual link destinations or navigation functionality for the hyperlinks
Creating separate pages for team members or mentors
Adding images or additional details about team members or mentors
